reviews.review_description: Recently I played chained escape and I beat level 1 so I tried going to level 2 but no matter what even if you beat level 1 you have to pay for level 2 and level 1 is HARD so when the Fourth of July update came I thoght that the Fourth of July bundle was free but NO not to mention the movement so unless you have 20 dollars then I would not recommend this game

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! We release a lot of free content as well, such as the Public Lobby and have plans for more future content. 

For the 2nd level, you can find a group of 4 and only 1 person needs the map for everyone to play!

reviews.review_description:
The game is amazing, and very fun, but there are a few minor issues.

The movement can be buggy, and hard to move. Another issue is that there aren’t many things to do for free. Once you beat stage 1, you have to pay for stage 2 which is a bit disappointing.

Besides those two issues, the game is awesome! Definitely recommended.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We're working to fix bugs and improve gameplay. We've also got content updates planned for the future, so please keep an eye out for those. Thank you for your feedback and support!

reviews.review_description: each and every time i try to move, i always get flung around, i literally couldnt even do anything, and the double jump is so sensitive. i move my hands 1 centimeter and i go flying up if im in the air. dont recommend.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. We've made some adjustments to the movement and added the option to control your double jump sensitivity since you posted this review, so we hope you give Chained Escape another play!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review! We're happy to hear you're enjoying the game.

Thank you for the feedback about the maps and paid content. We're still working on new updates, cosmetics, and maps and are trying out different payment options and models. Nothing is set in stone, so your feedback let's us know if we're on the right track or not. Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
This game is such a brilliant idea! I love how chaotic it is and it’s such a blast to play with friends. It can be raging, but just like crowbar climber (which im a big fan of), that’s what makes it beautiful and gives it a great sense of accomplishment. Looking forward to more games from this developer in the future!

UPDATE: Just finished the main level! It was great overall and was challenging enough to make you rage at times but not downright impossible which make you push on. Chain physics and movement were great. Looking forward to more levels!

I love the game and whenever people play and cooperate with me I will have such a fun time. Thank you for the creator of making this. This has gotten me to a farther point to the point where I just wanna play with more people and get more friends to know.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We're happy to hear you're enjoying the game.

reviews.review_title: Fu game but some few bugs
reviews.review_description: The g!me is fun but why is the chain so bugy? Also you can't get the black amd white prisoners suit anymore

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! The chains have their own physics and aren't supposed to be perfect, but resetting the position usually will fix any weird issues! 

The Black & White outfit is gone, but maybe it'll come back in the future? Who knows!

reviews.review_description: I really like the game but I noticed one problem, I can’t lift the chain, I don’t know if it’s just me, but every time I tried to move or lift the chain I just couldn’t. It was like it weighed a million pounds. Other than that it’s an amazing game and is a really fun VR game to play with your friends!
